ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weak_foot" INTEGER /* Player's weaker foot (1-5) */,
  "skill_moves" INTEGER /* Number of skill moves the player can perform (1-5) */,
  "position" TEXT /* Preferred playing position */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player */,
  "market_value" INTEGER /* Current market value of the player */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* Contract end date of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach managing the team */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's stadium */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team plays in */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team plays in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the coach */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  "preferred_formation" TEXT /* Preferred formation of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player (foreign key) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match or training session */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match (foreign key, can be NULL for training sessions) */,
  "training_session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session (foreign key, can be NULL for matches) */,
  "attacking_contribution" INTEGER /* Player's attacking contribution in the session (1-100) */,
  "defensive_contribution" INTEGER /* Player's defensive contribution in the session (1-100) */,
  "fitness_level" TEXT /* Player's fitness level (e.g., Excellent, Good, Fair, Poor) */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Injury status of the player (e.g., Fit, Injured, Suspended) */,
  "match_rating" INTEGER /* Player's match rating (1-100) */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player in the match */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the player in the match */,
  "training_session_rating" INTEGER /* Player's training session rating (1-100) */,
  "attendance" TEXT /* Player's attendance at the training session (e.g., Present, Absent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_training_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team (foreign key) */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., Win, Loss, Draw) */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "kickoff_time" TEXT /* Kickoff time of the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "competition" TEXT /* Competition the match was played in (e.g., league, cup, international) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team (foreign key) */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of the training session (e.g., tactical, technical, physical) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the training session */,
  "intensity_level" TEXT /* Intensity level of the training session (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Coach, Scout, Medical Staff, Admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with (can be NULL for club-wide roles) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player (foreign key) */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of the injury (e.g., muscle strain, broken bone) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "expected_recovery_time" TEXT /* Expected recovery time for the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player (foreign key) */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "transfer_fee" INTEGER /* Transfer fee paid for the player */,
  "destination_team" TEXT /* Name of the destination team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match (foreign key) */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., goal, assist, yellow card, red card) */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the event (foreign key) */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute of the match when the event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
